title: Sabaody’s Cruel World: Turning Point

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But with one word before his death,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Roger set off the "great pirate age"...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: He set the whole world Ablaze.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And I've never drank more either....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ... well, I don't know about that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Eh? You know shanks, old man!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The same words as the captain....!!!
